next_steps: Serologic testing for syphilis (RPR and treponemal-specific antibody)
Laboratory evaluation including ANA, ANCA, anti-CCP, and RF
Serum protein electrophoresis and ferritin levels
Comprehensive metabolic panel and complete blood count with peripheral smear review
Consider lumbar puncture if syphilis serology is positive to evaluate for neurosyphilis given symptoms of lightheadedness/autonomic involvement
